prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.3 kg; Height 184.3 cm; BMI 21.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 6.9%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 228mg/dL; 9 months ago 191mg/dL; 6 months ago 170mg/dL; 3 months ago 179mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.9kg; 9 months ago 72.3kg; 6 months ago 72.2kg; 3 months ago 71.1kg; current 72.3kg), Height (12 months ago 184.3cm; 9 months ago 184.3cm; 6 months ago 184.3cm; 3 months ago 184.3cm; current 184.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 89U/L; 9 months ago 96U/L; 6 months ago 96U/L; 3 months ago 89U/L; current 89U/L), AST (12 months ago 94U/L; 9 months ago 95U/L; 6 months ago 94U/L; 3 months ago 88U/L; current 88U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 258mg/g; 9 months ago 245mg/g; 6 months ago 229mg/g; 3 months ago 218mg/g; current 193mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 191mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 188mg/dL; 3 months ago 174mg/dL; current 180mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.8g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.93 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
